text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down modestly over the past day, with BTC leading the decline at -1.5%, suggesting mild selling pressure across the majors rather than panic. The Fear & Greed index at 12 (extreme fear) and worsening over the past week indicates sustained investor pessimism, though the relatively small daily losses suggest this is skepticism rather than capitulation. Bitcoin dominance holding above 56% paired with $101B in daily volume reflects normal market activity—money is still trading, but risk appetite remains depressed.
